changes.description: Rewrote SKILL.md to prioritize python-pptx for creation instead of html2pptx (which requires Playwright/Chrome). Reduced skill from 484 lines to ~105 lines. Added explicit python-pptx code examples for creation and extraction. Removed html2pptx.md, ooxml.md, scripts/ directory, and ooxml/schemas/ as unreferenced by final SKILL.md.
